item.text: I’m doing a final residual-risk sweep now: docs in context, any still-aspirational error codes, strictness symmetry at the remaining input boundaries, and any S3 fallout outside the test files we already touched. If this pass is clean, I’ll keep it clean and return empty finding lists.

item.command: /bin/zsh -lc "nl -ba docs/spec-build/epics/01-claude-impl-cli-skill/tech-design.md | sed -n '324,350p' && nl -ba docs/spec-build/epics/01-claude-impl-cli-skill/tech-design-cli-runtime.md | sed -n '156,180p' && nl -ba docs/spec-build/epics/01-claude-impl-cli-skill/tech-design-cli-runtime.md | sed -n '770,785p' && nl -ba docs/spec-build/epics/01-claude-impl-cli-skill/tech-design-cli-runtime.md | sed -n '968,988p' && nl -ba docs/spec-build/epics/01-claude-impl-cli-skill/test-plan.md | sed -n '366,376p'"

/bin/zsh -lc "nl -ba docs/spec-build/epics/01-claude-impl-cli-skill/tech-design.md | sed -n '324,350p' && nl -ba docs/spec-build/epics/01-claude-impl-cli-skill/tech-design-cli-runtime.md | sed -n '156,180p' && nl -ba docs/spec-build/epics/01-claude-impl-cli-skill/tech-design-cli-runtime.md | sed -n '770,785p' && nl -ba docs/spec-build/epics/01-claude-impl-cli-skill/tech-design-cli-runtime.md | sed -n '968,988p' && nl -ba docs/spec-build/epics/01-claude-impl-cli-skill/test-plan.md | sed -n '366,376p'"
item.aggregated_output:
324	|---|---|---|---|
   325	| `red-verify` | Red-phase gate | after writing tests, before Green | `bunx tsc --noEmit && bun run build && bun run validate` |
   326	| `verify` | Standard development gate | routine implementation | `bun run red-verify && bun test` |
   327	| `green-verify` | Green-phase gate | after implementation is green | `bun run verify && bun run guard:no-test-changes` |
   328	| `verify-all` | Deep verification and release gate | story completion, pre-release | `bun run green-verify && bun run smoke:impl-cli` |
   329	
   330	### Canonical Gate Mapping
   331	
   332	For this repo, the default mapping should be:
   333	
   334	| Gate | Command |
   335	|---|---|
   336	| Story gate | `bun run green-verify` |
   337	| Epic gate | `bun run verify-all` |
   338	
   339	If a project-specific override exists, preflight should surface it explicitly with source metadata. If not, these are the defaults the orchestrator records.
   340	
   341	Supporting scripts to add:
   342	
   343	- `typecheck`: `tsc --noEmit`
   344	- `guard:no-test-changes`: fail if test files changed during Green
   345	- `smoke:impl-cli`: run a bundled-CLI smoke test against a minimal fixture spec pack
   346	
   347	If no deeper integration smoke exists yet, `smoke:impl-cli` may emit a visible skip notice in its earliest version, but it must not silently pass as if a real smoke already ran.
   348	Interim packaged-CLI coverage (manifest, bundled artifact presence, and Node-run `inspect` smoke) lives in `scripts/__tests__/claude-impl-build.test.ts` until `smoke:impl-cli` is implemented.
   349	
   350	## Work Breakdown Summary
   156	### Result Routing Matrix
   157	
   158	This matrix is authoritative for handler implementation and tests.
   159	
   160	| Command Outcome | Envelope Status | Exit Code | Orchestrator Action |
   161	|---|---|---:|---|
   162	| `ready` | `ok` | 0 | proceed to next setup step |
   163	| `ready-for-verification` | `ok` | 0 | run verification or next bounded step |
   164	| `pass` | `ok` | 0 | evaluate for acceptance or next stage |
   165	| `cleaned` | `ok` | 0 | move into epic verification |
   166	| `ready-for-closeout` | `ok` | 0 | run final orchestrator-owned gate |
   167	| `needs-user-decision` | `needs-user-decision` | 2 | pause and request human clarification |
   168	| `needs-followup-fix` | `ok` | 2 | route same-session follow-up or fix path |
   169	| `needs-human-ruling` | `needs-user-decision` | 2 | pause for orchestrator/human ruling |
   170	| `revise` | `ok` | 2 | route fix and rerun verification |
   171	| `needs-more-routing` | `ok` | 2 | select another bounded correction path |
   172	| `needs-more-cleanup` | `ok` | 2 | continue cleanup cycle |
   173	| `needs-fixes` | `ok` | 2 | route fixes before closeout |
   174	| `needs-more-verification` | `ok` | 2 | launch additional verification/synthesis |
   175	| `block` | `blocked` | 3 | stop and inspect blocking error details |
   176	| parse/schema/runtime failure | `error` | 1 | treat as CLI failure rather than feature-state outcome |
   177	
   178	## Runtime Module Layout
   179	
   180	```text
   770	
   771	## Flow 4: Epic Cleanup, Verification, and Synthesis
   772	
   773	**Covers:** AC-7.1 to AC-7.3, AC-8.1 to AC-8.4
   774	
   775	At epic closeout the CLI executes three different kinds of work: cleanup-only correction, epic-level verifier batches, and synthesis. The orchestrator still determines whether the run can close. The CLI should never blur these responsibilities into one vague “finish the epic” command.
   776	
   777	The cleanup operation is distinct because it acts on an orchestrator-curated cleanup batch. It is not a general-purpose retry. It is a bounded correction-only workflow designed to start epic verification from the cleaned state rather than from an accumulation of known-but-deferred issues.
   778	Cleanup execution uses the `quick_fixer` role configuration from `impl-run.config.json`; there is no separate `cleanup_fixer` role in v1.
   779	
   780	```mermaid
   781	sequenceDiagram
   782	    participant Orchestrator
   783	    participant CLI
   784	    participant Cleanup as Cleanup Runner
   785	    participant EV as Epic Verifier Batch
   968	
   969	The preflight result should surface this config so the orchestrator can persist it into `team-impl-log.md`.
   970	
   971	### Canonical Gate Mapping
   972	
   973	Until a project overrides the defaults, the expected mapping for this repo is:
   974	
   975	| Gate | Command |
   976	|---|---|
   977	| Story gate | `bun run green-verify` |
   978	| Epic gate | `bun run verify-all` |
   979	
   980	This mapping should appear consistently in:
   981	
   982	- `preflight` output
   983	- `team-impl-log.md`
   984	- prompt assembly inputs
   985	- process-playbook examples
   986	
   987	When gate discovery comes from `package.json` scripts, surface the canonical invocable command (`bun run <script-name>`) rather than the expanded script body.
   988	
   366	| Test File | Minimum Tests |
   367	|---|---:|
   368	| `processes/impl-cli/tests/config-schema.test.ts` | 8 |
   369	| `processes/impl-cli/tests/result-contracts.test.ts` | 8 |
   370	| `processes/impl-cli/tests/cli-io-contract.test.ts` | 3 |
   371	| `scripts/__tests__/claude-impl-build.test.ts` | 4 |
   372	
   373	Interim packaged-CLI coverage lives in `scripts/__tests__/claude-impl-build.test.ts`, which checks manifest wiring, packaged references, bundled artifact presence, and a Node-run `inspect` smoke until `smoke:impl-cli` is implemented.
   374	
   375	### Story 1: Skill Surface
   376

item.text:
## Findings Fixed (id, summary, files changed) — empty list if none
- none

## Findings Surfaced To Orchestrator (id, summary, why uncertain) — empty list if none
- none

## Documentation Coherence Check (S1-S5, one line each)
- `S1 clean` — the `test-plan.md` update reads naturally in the Story 0 table and the follow-on sentence explains the interim packaged-CLI coverage without breaking the section flow.
- `S2 clean` — the `block` / `blocked` routing-matrix row now fits the verifier-batch outcome model cleanly, and I did not find orphan verifier-outcome references elsewhere in `tech-design-cli-runtime.md` still using `blocked` as the enum.
- `S3 clean` — canonical gate names are now consistent across `tech-design.md`, `tech-design-cli-runtime.md`, the updated tests, and the prompt-assembly expectations.
- `S4 clean` — the packaged-CLI coverage note in `tech-design.md` lands cleanly right after the visible-skip sentence and reads as a clarification, not a tangent.
- `S5 clean` — the cleanup/`quick_fixer` note sits in the correct Flow 4 cleanup section; I do not think it also needs duplication in Run Configuration because the coupling matters at cleanup execution time, not config definition time.

## Error-Code Aspirational-Gap Audit
No gap in the design’s listed stable codes. Every code named in the `tech-design-cli-runtime.md` stable list is thrown somewhere in the runtime and/or covered by tests:
- `INVALID_SPEC_PACK`
- `INVALID_RUN_CONFIG`
- `VERIFICATION_GATE_UNRESOLVED`
- `PROVIDER_UNAVAILABLE`
- `PROVIDER_OUTPUT_INVALID`
- `CONTINUATION_HANDLE_INVALID`
- `PROMPT_ASSET_MISSING`
- `PROMPT_INSERT_INVALID`

I did notice the implementation also uses `INVALID_INVOCATION` and `UNEXPECTED_ERROR`, but those look like deliberate extras beyond the “suggested stable error codes” list, not missing design updates.

## Strict-Schema Symmetry Audit
Provider-produced payloads are strict, and orchestrator-authored `impl-run.config.json` is now strict. The remaining non-strict input family is the free-form markdown `cleanup-batch` content, which is still intentionally regex/contract driven rather than schema parsed. CLI flags are parsed by `citty`, but that is a different boundary than the JSON-schema strictness fixes. I do not think this is a defect in this pass; it is just the remaining asymmetric input surface.

## S3 Fallout Residual Check (golden files, snapshots, cli-operations-doc)
- Golden files: none found in the impl-cli test surface; there is no `tests/fixtures` golden-JSON layer pinning raw gate bodies.
- Snapshots: no `toMatchSnapshot` or equivalent snapshot assertions found.
- `cli-operations-doc.test.ts`: unaffected; it checks process-ownership language, not gate-command string bodies.
- Remaining raw script bodies in tests are fixture inputs only, not asserted outputs.

## Idempotency Check
This fix pass is idempotent on the now-fixed codebase. Re-running it would not change behavior again:
- canonical gate discovery still returns the same `bun run <script-name>` commands
- provider tiers remain stable for the same subprocess outcomes
- story-role prompt assembly still omits epic-path lines while epic roles keep them
- strict config rejection only affects deliberately invalid config fixtures, not any valid fixtures introduced by the pass
- cleanup approval matching remains stable for the same batch text

## Files Changed In This Pass
- none

## Final Test Count and Delta From Pass 2 Baseline (266)
- `266`
- Delta from pass 2 baseline: `0`

## Gate Result After This Pass
- `not-run`

## Final Recommended Next Step: ready-for-verification | needs-followup-fix | needs-human-ruling | blocked
- `ready-for-verification`
